completed: Expanded faculty visibility for HoDs and faculty roles across all departments
Updated facultyController.js to support 'all' department filtering for HoDs
Removed departmental read-only restrictions for HoDs in faculty details and class lists
Modified faculty.routes.js to allow faculty role access to read-only endpoints
Updated ClassDetail.jsx to fetch all faculty for subject assignments
Updated FacultyList.jsx to display comprehensive faculty list for HoDs

decisions.decision: Allow HoDs and faculty to read all faculty data while keeping write operations (create/edit) department-scoped for HoDs
decisions.trade_offs: HoDs can see more data, but cannot modify it, preserving data integrity while enabling administrative workflows
